name: New command / entry
about: Suggest a command or workflow to add to the library
title: "[new] <short task name>"
labels: new-command
---

**Category:** <!-- an existing one if possible, e.g. Reconnaissance, Linux Essentials -->
**Task / title:**
**Description:** <!-- one or two plain-language sentences -->

**Command(s)** — note the shell(s): `ps` / `cmd` / `mac` / `linux` / `py`
```text

```

**Notes**
- Tool dependency (non-default)?
- Needs elevation / is it destructive?
- Offensive? If so, the MITRE ATT&CK id + a detection idea (required for red/purple entries).
- Source (so it can be verified) — original wording only, no vendor docs pasted verbatim.
